title: Polyline3D Object
description: Represents a single piecewise linear curve. This is a single curve that consists of a series of connected lines in 3D space.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient 3D polyline using an array of Point3D objects that defines the position of the polyline vertices.

methods.name: createByArray
methods.description: Creates a transient 3D polyline using an array of floating point values that specify the X, Y, Z coordinates for each point.

properties.name: asNurbsCurve
properties.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the polyline.

properties.name: curveType
properties.description: Returns the type of geometry this curve represents.

properties.name: evaluator
properties.description: Returns an evaluator object that lets you perform additional evaluations on the curve.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: pointCount
properties.description: Returns the number of points defining the polyline.

properties.name: points
properties.description: Gets and sets the points that define the coordinates of the polyline.

asNurbsCurve.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the polyline.

# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = polyline3D_var.asNurbsCurve

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = polyline3D_var.isValid

objectType.title: Polyline3D.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = polyline3D_var.objectType

pointCount.description: Returns the number of points defining the polyline.

syntax.python:

points.title: Polyline3D.points Property
points.description: Gets and sets the points that define the coordinates of the polyline.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = polyline3D_var.points

# Set the value of the property.
polyline3D_var.points = propertyValue

classType.title: Polyline3D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

create.title: Polyline3D.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient 3D polyline using an array of Point3D objects that defines the position of the polyline vertices.
create.return_description: Returns the created Polyline3D object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: points
parameters.description: An array of Point3D objects that define the coordinates of the curve.

createByArray.title: Polyline3D.createByArray Method
createByArray.description: Creates a transient 3D polyline using an array of floating point values that specify the X, Y, Z coordinates for each point.
createByArray.return_description: Returns the created Polyline3D object or null if the creation failed

parameters.name: pointCoordinates
parameters.description: An array of floating point values that define the X, Y, Z coordinates of each point in the polyline.

transformBy.title: Polyline3D.transformBy Method
transformBy.return_description: Return true if the transform was successful.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: A 3D matrix that defines the transform to apply to the curve.
